positive: Minimalist abstract illustration of a wandering celestial creature, like a stylized griffin or winged lion, flying through a cluster of deep indigo and sapphire nebula clouds. The creature should have a sleek, elegant silhouette with glowing gold accents, contrasting sharply against the dark cosmic background. Composition must be centralized, emphasizing the flyer's dramatic sweep. Use a modern, vector-art inspired style with strong line work and limited, impactful color blocking (navy, gold, cyan). The overall mood should be ethereal and majestic, designed for high-contrast apparel printing, with crisp edges and perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, jpeg artifacts, ugly, deformed, disfigured, monochrome, grayscale, realistic photography, people, faces
